Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants where it appears
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved compared to when followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time between Accepted + In Progress and Accepted + Wait in cases that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Closed in variants that contain Completed + In Call versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait in traces leading to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait when preceded by Accepted + Assigned versus when directly preceded by Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High') compared to low-impact incidents (impact = 'Low')
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time it takes Accepted + Wait to be performed after the first occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time of Accepted + Wait when followed by Accepted + In Progress versus when followed directly by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total waiting time to Accepted + Wait in cases that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait to the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'
